items.name_en: M23640 Full Leather Embossed Square Bag Collection New Fall/Winter ONTHEGO EAST WEST Handbag M23698 This OnTheGo East West handbag reinterprets the East West spacious structure with the OnTheGo small tote design, using Monogram Empreinte leather. Giant Monogram is embossed on the body, and the neat interior can hold daily essentials. Top handles and a detachable leather chain strap allow for multiple carrying ways. 25 x 13 x 10 cm.

items.name_en: M46595 M46596 Full Leather Messenger Bag Collection Small East West Métis Handbag The small East West Métis handbag features a trendy shoulder-bag silhouette. The compact body is made of soft Monogram Empreinte leather, featuring a distinctive S-lock and a stylish top handle, with a polished, shiny surface. Versatile and spacious. A detachable long shoulder strap makes it easy to carry on the shoulder or crossbody, a great companion for daily travel. Dimensions 21.5x6x13cm

items.name_en: M11429 M83546Low Key features a modern minimalist design, complemented by extremely soft and smooth calfskin and exquisite details. These include the LV embossed lock and calf hair leather lining. This carry-all style features a main compartment with a zipper for storing essentials like a phone, wallet, and keys, and an adjustable strap for waist or crossbody wear.

items.name_en: M22303 m22304【LOCKME EAST WEST 】
items.name_cn:
M22303 m22304【LOCKME EAST WEST 】
The new LockMe East West chain bag is full of 1990s metropolitan flair and is a wardrobe staple for both day and night occasions. Grainy calfskin shapes a simple structure, establishing an elegant foundation together with the smooth chain shoulder strap and LV Twist lock. It can hold a wallet or phone and other daily necessities.
Size: 23.5 x 14 x 6 cm

items.name_en: {Nano Diane handbag}M83300 m83566
items.name_cn:
{Nano Diane handbag}M83300 m83566
Condensing the classic structure of the Diane handbag with Monogram Empreinte leather, this piece recreates prototype details such as the rounded flap and belt-style closure. It offers ample space to store a phone and daily essentials. Detachable handles and a detachable and adjustable shoulder strap allow for flexible carrying, suitable for both day and night occasions~
Size 19 x 10.5 x 6cm

items.name_en: M24044 Black M50280 Twist MM LV Bloom bag celebrates spring with delightful new details. It is crafted from grained Epi leather, featuring a stunning two-tone LV turnlock and a decorative chain handle adorned with delicate Monogram floral patterns.
